name: Happy Merry Ending
overview: Seung-jun, a wedding singer, finds himself withdrawn after getting his heart broken by his first love. Jae-hyun, a charming pianist, becomes instantly besotted and sets out to pursue him.

trailers.title: Happy Merry Ending | Official Trailer | They celebrate other people's love and now it's their turn.
Happy Ending Romance | Official Teaser 2 | Will he be together with the man who makes him smile?
Happy Ending Romance | Official Teaser | The journey to find happiness begins...
